definition: How strongly the pathway preserves function while conditions change
measurement_note: Measure continuity of essential services buffers redundancy and response capacity

definition: How deeply the pathway changes system structure feedbacks and long-term trajectory
measurement_note: Assess whether governance resource flows feedbacks and identity change

definition: Capacity of institutions to coordinate legitimate and accountable transition
measurement_note: Assess authority participation staffing coordination legal flexibility and learning routines

definition: Expected contribution to reducing unequal exposure and transition burdens
measurement_note: Use disaggregated exposure participation rights repair investment and distributional effects

definition: Contribution to biodiversity ecosystem function carbon water soil and long-term ecological limits
measurement_note: Use ecological indicators restoration potential pressure reduction and regenerative feedback

definition: Public credibility and acceptance among affected communities and institutions
measurement_note: Use trust participation consent transparency accountability and conflict legitimacy

definition: Availability of funding labor knowledge infrastructure and operational capacity
measurement_note: Assess practical implementation constraints and resource mobilization

definition: Risk of maladaptation capture disruption lock-in displacement or unintended consequences
measurement_note: Assess transition failure modes and harm-amplification pathways
